name: XinJiang Korla Pear Co.,Ltd
summary: XinJiang Korla Pear Co.,Ltd engages in the development, cultivation, storage, warehousing, processing, and sale of agricultural products in China. It offers Korla fragrant pears, Turpan raisins, Xinjiang red dates, almonds, figs, other Xinjiang fruits, pear wines, and other products. The company sells its products under the Oriental fruit, Shayidong, and Oriental Shengguo brand names. XinJiang Korla Pear Co.,Ltd is based in Korla, China.
